title: Square Hotbar
description: Makes the hotbar in Minecraft more simple.
body:
![Square hotbar showcase in front of Minecraft background, with Golden Apple selected](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3510ac0e4e66b178c430f81b34ec359075cf9bb0.png)

**Square Hotbar** simplifies the Minecraft hotbar by displaying only the item slots, removing additional elements. It is particularly useful for players who focus on PvP gamemodes, though it can be used by anyone interested in a more streamlined interface.
